description_long: This object is a tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a robust and utilitarian design. The main body is constructed from metal, with a polymer fore-end and pistol grip for improved handling and durability. The shotgun has a single, cylindrical barrel with a short length, and a prominent pump-action slide located beneath the barrel, characterized by ribbed texturing for grip. The stock is a minimalist, skeletonized folding type, designed for compactness and ease of transport, and the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped. The receiver includes a rail segment for mounting optics or accessories, and the trigger guard is large and rounded, providing space for gloved fingers.
description: A matte black tactical shotgun with a pump-action slide, folding skeleton stock, and ergonomic pistol grip. Features a short barrel, accessory rail, and a large rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, pump grip, and the alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length, pump-action slide, folding skeleton stock, and accessory rail on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the folding stock and the alignment of the pistol grip and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the pump and stock profile.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with smooth edges and ample space
